trans-unit.target: Aspire ホスティング統合を追加しています...

trans-unit.source: Add a hosting integration to the AppHost
trans-unit.target: Aspire AppHost にホスティング統合を追加します。
Include third-party packages
Official packages only

trans-unit.source: Integration discovery scope: official, all, or third-party
trans-unit.target: Integration discovery scope: official, all, or third-party

trans-unit.source: An error occurred while adding the package: {0}
trans-unit.target: パッケージの追加中にエラーが発生しました: {0}

trans-unit.source: An error occurred while searching integrations: {0}
trans-unit.target: An error occurred while searching integrations: {0}
Output format (Table or Json)
Found {0} integration package(s).
trans-unit.note: {0} is the number of integration packages found.

trans-unit.target: Found {0} integration package(s) matching '{1}'.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the number of integration packages found, {1} is the search term provided by the user.

trans-unit.target: Group
Name
Package
Version

trans-unit.source: The name of the integration to add (e.g. redis, postgres)
trans-unit.target: 追加する統合の名前 (例: redis、postgres)。
Manage Aspire hosting integrations
Community Toolkit
Microsoft Aspire
Third-party
List available Aspire hosting integrations

trans-unit.source: An integration name is required when interactive input is not available.
trans-unit.target: An integration name is required when interactive input is not available.

trans-unit.source: The Aspire AppHost project file, or a directory to search, for channel-aware integration discovery
trans-unit.target: The Aspire AppHost project file, or a directory to search, for channel-aware integration discovery
Search available Aspire hosting integrations
The integration search query.
Invalid discovery scope '{0}'. Use 'official', 'all', or 'third-party'.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the invalid discovery scope value provided by the user.

trans-unit.source: No integration packages were found. Please check your internet connection or NuGet source configuration.
trans-unit.target: 統合パッケージが見つかりませんでした。インターネット接続または NuGet ソース構成を確認してください。
No integration packages matched '{0}'.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the search term provided by the user.

trans-unit.target: パッケージが見つかりませんでした。

trans-unit.source: No packages matched your search term '{0}'. Showing all available packages.
trans-unit.target: 検索語句 '{0}' に一致するパッケージはありません。使用可能なすべてのパッケージを表示しています。
trans-unit.note: {0} is the search term provided by the user.

trans-unit.source: No exact match was found for '{0}'. In non-interactive mode the integration name must exactly match a package id or friendly name; fuzzy fallback is disabled to prevent silently selecting the wrong package.
trans-unit.target: No exact match was found for '{0}'. In non-interactive mode the integration name must exactly match a package id or friendly name; fuzzy fallback is disabled to prevent silently selecting the wrong package.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the integration name provided by the user.

trans-unit.target: パッケージ {0}::{1} が正常に追加されました。
trans-unit.note: {0} is the package name, {1} is the version.

trans-unit.source: The package installation failed with exit code {0}.
trans-unit.target: The package installation failed with exit code {0}.

trans-unit.source: The Aspire AppHost project file, or a directory to search, to add the integration to
trans-unit.target: 統合を追加するプロジェクト ファイルへのパス。
Aspire 統合を検索しています...
Searching for version '{1}' of {0}...
trans-unit.note: {0} is the package name, {1} is the requested version.

trans-unit.target: {0} のバージョンを選択します:
追加する統合を選択します:
Select which integrations to show:

trans-unit.source: The NuGet source to use for the integration
trans-unit.target: 統合に使用する NuGet ソース。

trans-unit.source: The local NuGet source '{0}' does not exist. Create the local feed directory or use a valid package source URL.
trans-unit.target: The local NuGet source '{0}' does not exist. Create the local feed directory or use a valid package source URL.

trans-unit.source: The requested version '{1}' was not found for package '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: The requested version '{1}' was not found for package '{0}'.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the package name, {1} is the requested version.

trans-unit.source: When --version is specified in non-interactive mode, the integration name must exactly match a package or friendly name. No exact match was found for '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: When --version is specified in non-interactive mode, the integration name must exactly match a package or friendly name. No exact match was found for '{0}'.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the integration name provided by the user.

trans-unit.source: Stopped a running Aspire AppHost instance to allow package modification.
trans-unit.target: Stopped a running Aspire AppHost instance to allow package modification.

trans-unit.source: ✗ No, do not add this package
trans-unit.target: ✗ No, do not add this package

trans-unit.source: ⚠️ The package '{0}' is a third-party integration that is not owned or supported by the Aspire team. Do you want to add it?
trans-unit.target: ⚠️ The package '{0}' is a third-party integration that is not owned or supported by the Aspire team. Do you want to add it?
trans-unit.note: {0} is the package ID of the third-party integration.

trans-unit.source: ✓ Yes, add this package; I understand the risks
trans-unit.target: ✓ Yes, add this package; I understand the risks

trans-unit.source: The third-party package was not added.
trans-unit.target: The third-party package was not added.

trans-unit.source: Third-party packages are not owned or supported by the Aspire team. Contact the package owner for support.
trans-unit.target: Third-party packages are not owned or supported by the Aspire team. Contact the package owner for support.

trans-unit.source: Unable to stop one or more running Aspire AppHost instances. Please stop the application and try again.
trans-unit.target: Unable to stop one or more running Aspire AppHost instances. Please stop the application and try again.
予期しない数のパッケージが見つかりました。
プレリリース パッケージを使用する

trans-unit.source: The version of the integration to add
trans-unit.target: 追加する統合のバージョン。
